{{Quote|All this—gweek. Husbands and tuskers and fields and children—gweek. Sometimes ... I want gweek. Gweek for me. More so in slushtime, in the cold and the dark.|translated=1|Kufbrug|<ref name="Murder in Slushtime">{{JournalCite|14|Murder in Slushtime}}</ref>}}
'''Kufbrug''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] and the clan matron of the [[Bolgoink clan]]. She was a huge sow at nearly two meters in height and weighing over two hundred kilograms. She wore her long green-brown [[Hair/Legends|hair]] in braids and was covered with a large number of [[morrt]]s. This plus her large number of children marked her as especially attractive to Gamorreans.

Her original husband was the clan [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Vrokk]] and one of her elder daughters was [[Gundruk]]. Kufbrug and [[Guth]] were in love. When Vrokk died and Guth was framed and expected to be killed, Kufbrug fell into a depression. This was lifted when [[Callista Ming]] recruited her for help with the [[kheilwar]] that had killed Vrokk. The pair fought the [[Insect/Legends|insect]] for an entire night before killing it, clearing Guth's name. Kufbrug and Guth were then [[Marriage/Legends|married]].

==Personality and traits==
Kufbrug was particularly intelligent for an unmodified Gamorrean, able to puzzle out forgery and think of contingencies, to the surprise of Callista Ming. While she was seen as an incredibly attractive and commanding person, she was also sentimental and became depressed when she believed her beloved Guth would be killed.
